basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Associate and Technical Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Associate-I and Technical Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Project Associate-I: Maximum Age 50 years. Technical Assistant: Maximum Age 50 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate / Bachelor degree in relevant field / Diploma
qualification.details: Project Associate-I: Post Graduate in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology/Biomedical Sciences, Environmental Sciences, B. Pharma, or Bachelor degree in engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized university or equivalent. Candidates who have qualified at least a National Eligibility Test (CSIR-UGC NET/DBT-BET/ICMR-JRF, GATE or other Government-recognized national examinations) will be preferred. Technical Assistant: Bachelor degree in sciences/3 year diploma in engineering and technology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:aiims.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Post Graduate / Bachelor degree in relevant field / Diploma

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Post Graduate in Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Molecular Biology/Biomedical Sciences, Environmental Sciences, B. Pharma, or Bachelor degree in engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized university or equivalent. Candidates who have qualified at least a National Eligibility Test (CSIR-UGC NET/DBT-BET/ICMR-JRF, GATE or other Government-recognized national examinations) will be preferred. Technical Assistant: Bachelor degree in sciences/3 year diploma in engineering and technology.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Associate-I: Maximum Age 50 years. Technical Assistant: Maximum Age 50 years. Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website:aiims.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Associate-I and Technical Assistant posts is 15th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate-I and Technical Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by AIIMS Delhi for these positions. One vacancy is for Project Associate-I and the other is for Technical Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: For Project Associate-I, candidates need a Post Graduate degree in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, Biomedical Sciences, Environmental Sciences, B. Pharma, or a Bachelor's degree in engineering or technology or medicine.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant post is 50 years. There might be age relaxations applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this AIIMS Delhi recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post or submit it physically to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for both Project Associate-I and Technical Assistant positions will be as per the norms set by the organization. Specific details regarding the pay scale are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts primarily involves an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview round.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs are based in New Delhi at the All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi), specifically at the Dr. R.P. Centre, Ansari Nagar.
